title: Boot bridge-zephyr production firmware
description: Boot firmware/bridge-zephyr as a production application on every currently executable declared backend, beginning with native_sim and qemu_x86. Require a late application marker or protocol response. Build-only board fragments are recorded separately as BLOCKED until an emulator or physical observer exists.
acceptance_criteria: 1. native_sim and qemu_x86 images boot past application main with an external oracle. 2. Artifact hashes, commands, and logs are recorded. 3. Every declared bridge board fragment is classified WIN/FAIL/BLOCKED. 4. Any source-copy divergence affecting boot is filed separately.
notes: EVIDENCE SCOPE: startup proof only, not operational SLIP or LoRa bridging. Source revision 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364, branch source snapshot in detached workspace /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1 on verified LICHEN builder i-03d978911e97d4350 (ARM64, us-west-2c, Project=LICHEN). SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=1784142068. Known scoped workspace changes were confined to prior Renode/L2 validation; firmware/bridge-zephyr source was unchanged. NATIVE64 WIN: build command: west build -p always -b native_sim/native/64 -s $repo/firmware/bridge-zephyr -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/bridge-native64 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$repo/lichen. Runtime command: timeout 10s /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/bridge-native64/zephyr/zephyr.exe > /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/bridge-native64-runtime.log 2>&1. Oracle: log contains Booting Zephyr OS build v3.7.0 and main: ready; exit 124 is expected because main then sleeps forever. Artifact SHA-256 1bde4e09f8aa143fcc2b7305e0b8c9c23bd6f8063b2095ac6c67d71c3cf33f14. Build log: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/bridge-native64-build.log. Unqualified 32-bit native_sim was not counted as a result: its configure correctly rejected the ARM64 host and required native_sim/native/64; failed-at-configure evidence is bridge-native-build.log. QEMU_X86 WIN: build command: west build -p always -b qemu_x86 -s $repo/firmware/bridge-zephyr -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/bridge-qemu-x86 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$repo/lichen. Generated west run initially failed before firmware execution because configured SLIP expected /tmp/slip.sock. Runtime command used the same generated QEMU binary/CPU/machine/kernel and two-UART topology, replacing only unavailable -serial unix:/tmp/slip.sock with -serial null: timeout 10s $qemu -m 32 -cpu qemu32,+nx,+pae -machine q35 -device isa-debug-exit,iobase=0xf4,iosize=0x04 -no-reboot -nographic -machine acpi=off -net none -chardev stdio,id=con,mux=on -serial chardev:con -mon chardev=con,mode=readline -serial null -kernel $out/zephyr/zephyr.elf > bridge-qemu-x86-runtime.log 2>&1. Oracle: log contains Booting Zephyr OS build v3.7.0 and main: ready; exit 124 is expected idle-loop timeout. This proves startup only and explicitly does not prove SLIP. Artifact SHA-256 a3f58d9d7431f0dc7fbaaa956a459532633217745f4315019012f08e1153878c. Logs: /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/bridge-qemu-x86-build.log and bridge-qemu-x86-runtime.log. Both successful builds passed tools/zephyr-clean-worktree.sh verify module-isolation checks; no native/QEMU process remained. HARDWARE RESULT ROWS: BLOCKED heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu -> heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/esp32s3/procpu, no physical/faithful emulator observer, follow-up project-LICHEN-k8o1. BLOCKED t_deck_esp32s3_procpu -> t_deck/esp32s3/procpu, same dependency k8o1. BLOCKED t_echo_nrf52840 -> t_echo/nrf52840, same dependency k8o1. BLOCKED rak4631_nrf52840 -> rak4631/nrf52840, same dependency k8o1. FAIL heltec_t114: no demonstrated canonical Zephyr board mapping, remediation project-LICHEN-2u26. FAIL heltec_vision_master_e213: no canonical mapping, 2u26. FAIL heltec_vision_master_e290: no canonical mapping, 2u26. FAIL heltec_wireless_tracker: no canonical mapping, 2u26. FAIL lilygo_tbeam: no canonical mapping, 2u26. FAIL rak19007_wisblock: duplicates RAK4631 core identity without a board target, 2u26. FAIL seeed_t1000e: stale alias that does not auto-merge for t1000_e/nrf52840, 2u26. FAIL seeed_wio_tracker_1110: copied T1000-E mapping without a board definition, 2u26. FAIL station_g2: no canonical mapping, 2u26. FAIL xiao_s3_wio_sx1262: no canonical composite board mapping, 2u26. Prior duplicate-source divergence was fixed under project-LICHEN-2067.1.1; active target-qualified filename audit/build validation was completed under project-LICHEN-2067.1.1.1.
close_reason: Proved bridge-zephyr startup on native_sim/native/64 and qemu_x86 with retained full hashes, logs, exact commands, late main: ready oracle, controlled idle-loop timeouts, and module-isolation checks. Classified all 14 hardware fragments: 4 valid targets BLOCKED under project-LICHEN-k8o1 and 10 unmapped/stale fragments FAIL under project-LICHEN-2u26. Three independent reviews converged with no findings.
